query_title: Tini: The New Life of Violetta

recommendations.title: I Knew Her Well
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the Italian countryside experiences the dark side of the business after she moves to Rome to become a star.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Out of the Clear Blue Sky
recommendations.overview: Returning to Earth as an imitator, the legendary Mexican artist Pedro Infante must prove that he is no longer a womanizer to enter paradise.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
recommendations.overview: A struggling musician becomes a 12-year-old musical prodigy's guardian for a summer.

recommendations.title: Danny Collins
recommendations.overview: An ageing hard-living 1970s rock star decides to change his life when he discovers a 40-year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon.

recommendations.title: Under the Sea: A Descendants Story
recommendations.overview: Mal emerges from the shadows of a mystical forest onto a dark coastline where she crosses paths with Dizzy.

recommendations.title: Fabrizio De André: Principe libero
recommendations.overview: A biopic on the personal and artistic life of Italian songwriter Fabrizio De André.

recommendations.title: Farinelli
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.

recommendations.title: Fierce
recommendations.overview: Talent and passion for music can take one to the very top. On the way, however, there are going to be showbiz traps.
